'''鈭歱-n-dh''' ('''kapanadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imitate|imitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imitate|imitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kapanadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanadh|thipanadh]] || [[word:jipanadh|jipanadh]] || [[word:shipanadh|shipanadh]] || [[word:kipanadh|kipanadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanadh|thuthupanadh]] || [[word:jujupanadh|jujupanadh]] || [[word:shushupanadh|shushupanadh]] || [[word:kukupanadh|kukupanadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupanadh|thupanadh]] || [[word:jupanadh|jupanadh]] || [[word:shupanadh|shupanadh]] || [[word:kupanadh|kupanadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupanadh|thupanadh]] || [[word:jupanadh|jupanadh]] || [[word:shupanadh|shupanadh]] || [[word:kupanadh|kupanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepanadh|thepanadh]] || [[word:jepanadh|jepanadh]] || [[word:shepanadh|shepanadh]] || [[word:kepanadh|kepanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopanadh|thothopanadh]] || [[word:jojopanadh|jojopanadh]] || [[word:shoshopanadh|shoshopanadh]] || [[word:kokopanadh|kokopanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopanadh|thopanadh]] || [[word:jopanadh|jopanadh]] || [[word:shopanadh|shopanadh]] || [[word:kopanadh|kopanadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanadh|thopanadh]] || [[word:jopanadh|jopanadh]] || [[word:shopanadh|shopanadh]] || [[word:kopanadh|kopanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙panadh|th忙panadh]] || [[word:j忙panadh|j忙panadh]] || [[word:sh忙panadh|sh忙panadh]] || [[word:k忙panadh|k忙panadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapanadh|thathapanadh]] || [[word:jajapanadh|jajapanadh]] || [[word:shashapanadh|shashapanadh]] || [[word:kakapanadh|kakapanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapanadh|thapanadh]] || [[word:japanadh|japanadh]] || [[word:shapanadh|shapanadh]] || [[word:kapanadh|kapanadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapanadh|thapanadh]] || [[word:japanadh|japanadh]] || [[word:shapanadh|shapanadh]] || [[word:kapanadh|kapanadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapanadh|shapanadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapanadh|goshapanadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapanadh|gokishapanadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapanadhn眉|shapanadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkn眉|goshapanadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanadhn眉|gokishapanadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapanadhsh毛|shapanadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapanadhnksh毛|goshapanadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapanadhsh毛|gokishapanadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanadhro|shapanadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkro|goshapanadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanadhro|gokishapanadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanadhmu|shapanadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkmu|goshapanadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanadhmu|gokishapanadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapanadhsher|shapanadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapanadhnksher|goshapanadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapanadhsher|gokishapanadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapanadhng|shapanadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkng|goshapanadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapanadhng|gokishapanadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapanadhya|shapanadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkya|goshapanadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapanadhya|gokishapanadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapanadhyam|shapanadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkyam|goshapanadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapanadhyam|gokishapanadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanadhn眉sh毛|shapanadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkn眉sh毛|goshapanadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanadhn眉sh毛|gokishapanadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanadhn眉ro|shapanadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkn眉ro|goshapanadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanadhn眉ro|gokishapanadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanadhn眉mu|shapanadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkn眉mu|goshapanadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanadhn眉mu|gokishapanadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanadhsh毛n眉|shapanadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanadhnksh毛n眉|goshapanadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanadhsh毛n眉|gokishapanadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanadhsh毛ro|shapanadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanadhnksh毛ro|goshapanadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanadhsh毛ro|gokishapanadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanadhsh毛mu|shapanadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanadhnksh毛mu|goshapanadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanadhsh毛mu|gokishapanadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanadhron眉|shapanadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkron眉|goshapanadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanadhron眉|gokishapanadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanadhrosh毛|shapanadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkrosh毛|goshapanadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanadhrosh毛|gokishapanadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanadhromu|shapanadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkromu|goshapanadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanadhromu|gokishapanadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanadhmun眉|shapanadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkmun眉|goshapanadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanadhmun眉|gokishapanadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanadhmush毛|shapanadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkmush毛|goshapanadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanadhmush毛|gokishapanadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanadhmuro|shapanadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanadhnkmuro|goshapanadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanadhmuro|gokishapanadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
